title: Wooden Rolling Pin for Baking (40 X 4 CM) with Profiled Palm Supporting Edges - Wood Dough for Fondant, Pie Crust, Cookie, Pastry, Dough - Professional Standard Rolling Pins
features: GREAT FOR ROLLING DOUGH AND PASTRY: Besto rolling pins for baking are great for what they are made for - they roll and play their part in turning your regular food into a work of ART; Ensure even thickness of pizza or pastry dough and chapati/roti with large fondant rolling pin

DURABLE, STRONG & STURDY MATERIAL: Besto dough roller pin is made of solid beech wood; it's study and if needed you can press it hard on dough without fear of breaking it; Finely smooth surface without any bumpy bits on it; perfectly round pastry rolling pin for rolling dough

EASY TO USE AND CLEAN: Our rolling pin wood has everything one could possibly want in a kitchen rolling pin! It is easy to use and store. Wash this wooden rolling pin under running soapy water and dry with a kitchen towel. We do not recommend dishwashing or immersing in water; occasionally spray it with any vegetable or mineral oil to remain in good shape

MULTIPURPOSE USAGE: Besto wooden rolling pins for baking can be used as dough roller, chapati rolling pin, pasta rolling pin, icing rolling pin, eid rolling pin, roti rolling pin, pizza rolling pin, gingerbread rolling pin, childrens rolling pin, clay rolling pin, playdough rolling pin

MAKES FOR A PERFECT GIFT: Besto's 100% natural wooden rolling pins not only help in making amazing foods at home and restaurants but also makes for a perfect gift of a lifetime - share this treasure with your friends and family on special occasions such as mother's day, father's day, birthdays or anniversaries
